description: Capability for the main POS window
_NOTE_w1_c16: Wave 1 C16 replaced the `core:default` wildcard with the explicit union of its sub-defaults. Effective permission surface is unchanged, but the grant is now auditable in this file. Follow-up hardening: review each sub-default and drop unused pieces (e.g. `core:menu:default` if no renderer code uses the menu API), plus add explicit denies for opt-in dangerous permissions like `allow-create-webview-window` once those permission names are verified against the current Tauri version.
